ns1:revision.ns1:text:
== Attendance ==
* Microsoft: Ellis Wilson, Xiaolin Zang, Cyrus Ramavarapu * Aeon Computing: Arshad Hussain * Iowa State University: Shane Nehring * DataDirect Networks: Jason Huselton * Oak Ridge National Lab: Anjus George * University of Cambridge: Gwen Dawes
== Minutes ==
Status update provided on previously assigned tasks:
* Ellis: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-542 Lustre Wiki: Review Lustre Tuning Pages] - Not yet begun * Cyrus: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-536 Lustre Wiki: Review Old/Obscure Tool or System Integration Pages] - Opened deletion tasks, which Ellis carried out * Xiaolin: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-537 Lustre Wiki: Review Robinhood Policy Engine Page] - Not yet begun * Shane: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-540 Lustre Wiki: Review ZFS Feature Pages] - Updated ZFS Compression article, and made recommendations for deletion/reorg of ZFS tuning content. Still in-progress. * Jason: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-539 Lustre Wiki: Review Introductory Pages] - Not yet begun * Anjus: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-541 Lustre Wiki: Review Lustre Internal Pages] - Not yet begun * Gwen: Got access to word document with all tasks, and plans to send over desired task for next meeting
No new tasks picked up -- everyone is continuing to work on what is shown above.
[[Category:DWG]]
